findings.message: The owner's email address (PII) is written to application logs via log.info("item_created", ..., owner_email=payload.owner_email). The Item model explicitly annotates owner_email as PII with the instruction 'do not include in logs or external responses', yet this audit log emits it in plaintext. Logging PII risks long-term retention in log aggregation systems beyond the data's purpose and exposes it to anyone with log access.
findings.suggestion: Do not log the raw email. Log only non-PII identifiers (e.g. item_id), or if an owner reference is required for auditing, log a stable hash/pseudonymized token instead of the plaintext address: log.info("item_created", item_id=item.id).
